generatedSentence: A grand, bejeweled leader, a maverick airman known for his efficient backstroke, sought to invigorate the nascent firmament, currently a vast playground. He would grant oxygen to the deeps, overcoming a lockout that governmental regulations strictly prohibit, though someone found his proudly displayed illustration of new helipads and a keyway to unlock a hidden energy stockpile quite farcical. This radical deviation from the norm, a newsworthy tactic, was met with hysterics and a vehement newsreel broadcast designed to vituperate his vision. They feared the whirlwind of change, predicting a vehicular disaster or a millstone around society's neck. The understudy to the main antagonist, a rapacious lion, jiving to kazoos, began a full-scale huckstering campaign to obsess the public with errors and imperfections. The actual conflict began when the antagonist, a king known for his cockscomb haircut and bejeweled hips, used a tiny nano device to induce ringworm, a spiritual affliction, into the firmament's core. His boosters sent out irregular voltages, causing a deviation. As cranes worked to repair the system, he attempted to deceive the masses with a hackneyed prediction, a farcical enlargement shown on the www, even boasting a trim mudguard on his war machine. However, Aero had an endowed tactical advantage, having switched a vital utensil for a pocketknife containing fermium. He created a holistic booster, a lighter, not kerosine, igniting a powerful counter-attack. The leader, with a triumphant trumpet sound, used his backswimmer skills to navigate the chaos, overthrowing the tyrant. The resolution brought peace, a pleasant week, and even gingerbed on every bed, ending the row and proving the veracity of his original, bold vision.
panelSentences: A grand, bejeweled leader, a maverick airman known for his efficient backstroke, sought to invigorate the nascent firmament, currently a vast playground. He would grant oxygen to the deeps, overcoming a lockout that governmental regulations strictly prohibit, though someone found his proudly displayed illustration of new helipads and a keyway to unlock a hidden energy stockpile quite farcical.

This radical deviation from the norm, a newsworthy tactic, was met with hysterics and a vehement newsreel broadcast designed to vituperate his vision. They feared the whirlwind of change, predicting a vehicular disaster or a millstone around society's neck. The understudy to the main antagonist, a rapacious lion, jiving to kazoos, began a full-scale huckstering campaign to obsess the public with errors and imperfections.

The actual conflict began when the antagonist, a king known for his cockscomb haircut and bejeweled hips, used a tiny nano device to induce ringworm, a spiritual affliction, into the firmament's core. His boosters sent out irregular voltages, causing a deviation. As cranes worked to repair the system, he attempted to deceive the masses with a hackneyed prediction, a farcical enlargement shown on the www, even boasting a trim mudguard on his war machine.

However, Aero had an endowed tactical advantage, having switched a vital utensil for a pocketknife containing fermium. He created a holistic booster, a lighter, not kerosine, igniting a powerful counter-attack. The leader, with a triumphant trumpet sound, used his backswimmer skills to navigate the chaos, overthrowing the tyrant. The resolution brought peace, a pleasant week, and even gingerbed on every bed, ending the row and proving the veracity of his original, bold vision.
rawPanelSentences: A grand, bejeweled leader, a maverick airman known for his efficient backstroke, sought to invigorate the nascent firmament, currently a vast playground. He would grant oxygen to the deeps, overcoming a lockout that governmental regulations strictly prohibit, though someone found his proudly displayed illustration of new helipads and a keyway to unlock a hidden energy stockpile quite farcical.

This radical deviation from the norm, a newsworthy tactic, was met with hysterics and a vehement newsreel broadcast designed to vituperate his vision. They feared the whirlwind of change, predicting a vehicular disaster or a millstone around society's neck. The understudy to the main antagonist, a rapacious lion, jiving to kazoos, began a full-scale huckstering campaign to obsess the public with errors and imperfections.

The actual conflict began when the antagonist, a king known for his cockscomb haircut and bejeweled hips, used a tiny nano device to induce ringworm, a spiritual affliction, into the firmament's core. His boosters sent out irregular voltages, causing a deviation. As cranes worked to repair the system, he attempted to deceive the masses with a hackneyed prediction, a farcical enlargement shown on the www, even boasting a trim mudguard on his war machine.

However, Aero had an endowed tactical advantage, having switched a vital utensil for a pocketknife containing fermium. He created a holistic booster, a lighter, not kerosine, igniting a powerful counter-attack. The leader, with a triumphant trumpet sound, used his backswimmer skills to navigate the chaos, overthrowing the tyrant. The resolution brought peace, a pleasant week, and even gingerbed on every bed, ending the row and proving the veracity of his original, bold vision.
imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, vibrant neon futurism, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting, thick white gutters, clean black borders. The protagonist is a regal airman wearing a chrome helmet with glowing blue visors and a flowing, iridescent cape. TOP-LEFT PANEL: The regal airman proudly presenting a glowing blueprint on a holographic projection, seen from a wide shot, looking up at him. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: A menacing lion-like figure on a stage, surrounded by frantic huckstering crowds, seen from a dramatic low-angle shot. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: Giant mechanical cranes struggling to repair a glowing crystalline structure, with a small, shadowy figure manipulating a nano-device from a distant hilltop, shown in a medium shot. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: The regal airman, victorious and triumphant, standing over the overthrown antagonist, with a celebratory light emanating from the firmament, depicted in a powerful heroic full shot. NO text, NO speech bubbles, NO dialogue.

definitions.definition: (outdoors) A large open space for children to play on, usually having dedicated play equipment (such as swings and slides).

definitions.definition: To forbid, disallow, or proscribe officially; to make illegal or illicit.

definitions.definition: In a proud manner.

definitions.definition: An important person

definitions.definition: Some person.
definitions.example: Can someone help me, please?

definitions.definition: A big cat, Panthera leo, native to Africa, India and formerly much of Europe.

definitions.definition: (by extension) Any of various extant and extinct big cats, especially the mountain lion.

An individual who shows strength and courage, attributes associated with the lion.
A famous person regarded with interest and curiosity.
A light brown color that resembles the fur of a lion.
An old Scottish coin, with a lion on the obverse, worth 74 shillings.
Of the light brown color that resembles the fur of a lion.
The opposite of a strike; a labor disruption where management refuses to allow workers into a plant to work even if they are willing.
The action of installing a lock to keep someone out of an area, such as eviction of a tenant by changing the lock.
(by extension) The exclusion of others from a certain place or situation.
definitions.example: It's another front-row lockout for Mercedes on the starting grid of the Japanese Grand Prix.

definitions.definition: A situation where the system is not responding to input.
A safety device designed to prevent touching a moving part when it is under operation.
The final portion of a weightlifting motion where all applicable limbs or joints are fully extended or "locked out".
An exercise meant to increase strength in the lockout portion of a lifting motion.

definitions.definition: A slot into which a precision attachment (a key) is fitted.
A petroleum-based thin and colorless fuel

definitions.definition: The act of granting; a bestowing or conferring; concession; allowance; permission.
The yielding or admission of something in dispute.

definitions.definition: A transfer of property by deed or writing; especially, an appropriation or conveyance made by the government.

definitions.definition: The deed or writing by which such a transfer is made.
An application for a grant (monetary boon to aid research or the like).
(ditransitive) to give (permission or wish)

definitions.definition: (ditransitive) To bestow or confer, with or without compensation, particularly in answer to prayer or request; to give.
To agree with (someone) on (something); to accept (something) for the sake of argument; to admit to (someone) that (something) is true.
To assent; to consent.
A transuranic chemical element (symbol Fm) with an atomic number of 100.

A board game for two players in which each has 15 stones which move between 24 triangular points according to the roll of a pair of dice; the object is to move all of one's pieces around, and bear them off the board.
A victory in the game when the loser has not borne off a stone, and still has one or more stones in the winner's inner home row or on the bar.
To win at a backgammon game with the opponent having one or more pieces in the winner’s inner home row or on the bar.
Of or pertaining to a vehicle or vehicles, usually specifically cars and trucks.
definitions.example: Ernest had a fear of vehicular travel, and ended up walking everywhere.

definitions.definition: Of or pertaining to a language that is used as a contact language between two groups who do not share a common native tongue nor a common culture.
definitions.example: English is used as a vehicular language in many business settings.

definitions.definition: Alternative form of mike
Alternative form of mike
definitions.example: If we add the drum kit, we'll have to mic the orchestra.

definitions.definition: An early station wagon or estate car in which the rear portion of the car's bodywork is made of wood, often associated with Southern California surfing culture.

An erection of the penis.
Covered in woods; wooded.

Non-herbaceous.

(of a surface) rough

definitions.definition: To be swung or whisked.

definitions.definition: To trim.
definitions.example: to switch a hedge

definitions.definition: To turn from one railway track to another; to transfer by a switch; generally with off, from, etc.
definitions.example: to switch off a train; to switch a car from one track to another

definitions.definition: To shift to another circuit.
In a strict manner.
definitions.example: He adhered strictly to the diet his doctor prescribed.

definitions.definition: In a limited manner; only
In a narrow or limited sense.
definitions.example: That term refers strictly to smaller birds.

definitions.definition: In a manner that applies to every member of a set or every interval of a function
A contagious fungal infection of the skin, characterised by ring-shaped discoloured patches, covered by vesicles or scales.
An Asian plant, of the species Fagopyrum esculentum.
The fruit of this plant used as a pseudocereal.
Any of the wild buckwheats in the genus Eriogonum.
The rear, back, or unseen portion (of something).
definitions.example: The back end of the operation is kept out of sight of the customers.

definitions.definition: That part of a hardware or software system that is farthest from the user; the internals rather than the user interface.
The latter end of any given time, especially the latter part of the year; autumn; late autumn.
Offering nothing that is stimulating or challenging.
Lifeless, dull, or banal.
Tasteless, bland, or insipid.
(with "the") The deep part of a lake, sea, etc.
definitions.example: creatures of the deep

definitions.definition: (with "the") A silent time; quiet isolation.
definitions.example: the deep of night

definitions.definition: A deep shade of colour.
The profound part of a problem.
(with "the") The sea, the ocean.
A fielding position near the boundary.
definitions.example: Russell is a safe pair of hands in the deep.

definitions.definition: A pilot of an aircraft.
A member of an air force.
A person of a rank in the U.S. Air Force above airman basic and below airman first class.
A naval seaman, especially one in the U.S. Navy, who works on and/or handles aircraft.
Those qualities or features that are imperfect; the characteristic, state, or quality of being imperfect.
definitions.example: You can accept your imperfection or try to improve.

definitions.definition: Something that makes something else less than perfect; a blemish, impurity, error, etc.
definitions.example: He loves me despite my imperfections.

definitions.definition: Interesting enough to be reported as a news
To reproach with contemptuous words; to deride, to mock, to taunt.
To say in a mocking or taunting manner.
To make a mocking remark or remarks; to jeer.
To accord or agree.
definitions.example: That explanation doesn’t jibe with the facts.

definitions.definition: Alternative spelling of gybe
To deceive; to be deceptive.
definitions.example: Don’t try to jive me! I know where you were last night!

definitions.definition: To dance.
A performer who understudies; a standby.
To study or know a role to such an extent as to be able to replace the normal performer when required.
To act as an understudy (to someone).
To act in a similar manner to some known person.
An instrument or device for domestic use, especially in the kitchen.
definitions.example: We have convenient storage for all the kitchen utensils.

definitions.definition: A useful small tool, implement, or vessel.
definitions.example: He stocked up on old-style writing utensils.

definitions.definition: Any person that leads or directs
An animal that leads
Someone or something that leads or conducts
A maneuver, or action calculated to achieve some end.
A maneuver used against an enemy.
A sequence of moves that limits the opponent's options and results in an immediate and tangible advantage, typically in the form of material.
Tactical; of or relating to the art of military and naval tactics.
Describing a polymer whose repeat units are identical.
A line of objects, often regularly spaced, such as seats in a theatre, vegetable plants in a garden etc.
A line of entries in a table, etc., going from left to right, as opposed to a column going from top to bottom.
(plural "grand") A thousand of some unit of currency, such as dollars or pounds. (Compare G.)
(plural "grands") A grand piano
Of a large size or extent; great.
definitions.example: a grand army

definitions.definition: Great in size, and fine or imposing in appearance or impression; illustrious, dignified, magnificent.
definitions.example: His simple vision has transformed into something far more grand.

definitions.definition: Having higher rank or more dignity, size, or importance than other persons or things of the same name.
definitions.example: The Grand Viziers of the Ottoman Empire.

definitions.definition: (usually in compound forms) Standing in the second or some more remote degree of parentage or descent.
definitions.example: grandfather, grandson, grand-child

definitions.definition: Fine; lovely.
definitions.example: A cup of tea? That'd be grand.

definitions.definition: Containing all the parts proper to a given form of composition.
To decorate or bedeck with jewels or gems.
Covered in jewels, especially as decoration
A cover over the wheels of a vehicle, or a flap behind that wheel, to prevent water and mud being projected.
An unbranded range animal.
(by extension) Anything dishonestly obtained.
(by extension) One who is unconventional or does not abide by rules.
(by extension) One who creates or uses controversial or unconventional ideas or practices.
A person in the military who became an officer by going to college while on active duty as an enlisted person.
A queen and a jack as a starting hand in Texas hold 'em.
The chemical element (symbol O) with an atomic number of 8 and relative atomic mass of 15.9994. It is a colorless and odorless gas.
Molecular oxygen (O2), a colorless, odorless gas at room temperature, also called dioxygen.
A mixture of oxygen and other gases, administered to a patient to help them breathe.
An atom of this element.
The state, quality, or condition of being wrong.
A mistake; an accidental wrong action or a false statement not made deliberately.
Sin; transgression.
A failure to complete a task, usually involving a premature termination.
The difference between a measured or calculated value and a true one.
A play which is scored as having been made incorrectly.
One or more mistakes in a trial that could be grounds for review of the judgement.
Any alteration in the DNA chemical structure occurring during DNA replication, recombination or repairing.
To function improperly due to an error, especially accompanied by error message.
definitions.example: Remove that line of code and the script should stop erroring there.

definitions.definition: To show or contain an error or fault.
definitions.example: The block transmission errored near the start and could not be received.

definitions.definition: To err.
To provide with a dower or a dowry.
To give property to (someone) as a gift; specifically, to provide (a person or institution) with support in the form of a permanent fund of money or other benefits.
Followed by with, or rarely by of: to enrich or furnish with some faculty or quality.
Usually in the passive: to naturally furnish (with something).
definitions.example: She was endowed with a beautiful voice.

definitions.definition: Provided or furnished with something.
Founded by an endowment.
The fleshy red crest of a rooster
A red cap once worn by court jesters
A yellow rattle, Rhinanthus minor (flowering plant native to Eurasia)
An annual garden plant, Celosia cristata, having showy red clusters of flowers
A conceited dandy
A serrated cleat once fitted to the yards of a square-rigged ship and used when the sail was being reefed
Any bird of the family Gruidae, large birds with long legs and a long neck which is extended during flight.
Ardea herodias, the great blue heron.
A mechanical lifting machine or device, often used for lifting heavy loads for industrial or construction purposes.
An iron arm with horizontal motion, attached to the side or back of a fireplace for supporting kettles etc. over the fire.
A siphon, or bent pipe, for drawing liquors out of a cask.
A forked post or projecting bracket to support spars, etc.; generally used in pairs.
To extend (one's neck).
To raise or lower with, or as if with, a crane.
To pull up before a jump.
The cranium.
Related to holism.
Relating to a study of the whole instead of a separation into parts.
The peak or crest of a hill.
To move (one object) while maintaining contact with another object over some area, with pressure and friction.
definitions.example: I rubbed my hands together for warmth.

definitions.definition: To rub something against (a second thing).
definitions.example: I rubbed the glass with the cloth.

definitions.definition: To be rubbed against something.
definitions.example: My shoes are beginning to rub.

definitions.definition: To spread a substance thinly over; to smear.
definitions.example: meat rubbed with spices before barbecuing

definitions.definition: To move or pass with difficulty.
definitions.example: to rub through woods, as huntsmen

definitions.definition: To scour; to burnish; to polish; to brighten; to cleanse; often with up or over.
definitions.example: to rub up silver

definitions.definition: To hinder; to cross; to thwart.
(bowls) To touch the jack with the bowl.
Having had a substance applied through rubbing.
A simple musical instrument (membranophone) consisting of a pipe with a hole in it, producing a buzzing sound when the player hums into it.
To play the kazoo.
Furnace or hearth where metals are heated prior to hammering them into shape.
Workshop in which metals are shaped by heating and hammering them.
The act of beating or working iron or steel.
(usually uncountable) The vault of the heavens, where the clouds, sun, moon, and stars can be seen; the heavens, the sky.
The field or sphere of an activity or interest.
definitions.example: the international fashion firmament

definitions.definition: In the geocentric Ptolemaic system, the eighth celestial sphere which carried the fixed stars; (by extension) any celestial sphere.
(obsolete except biblical) The abode of God and the angels; heaven.
A piece of jewellery worn in a headdress with numerous gems resembling stars in the sky.
A basis or foundation; a thing which lends strength or support.
The act or process of making firm or strengthening.
To impart vigor, strength, or vitality to.
definitions.example: Exercise is invigorating.

definitions.definition: To heighten or intensify.
To give life or energy to.
definitions.example: The cold water invigorated him.

definitions.definition: To make lively.

A knife with blades or tools that the user can fold or retract into its handle, and of a size small enough for carrying safely and handily in a pocket. Since the late 19th century the term "penknife" has not been distinct from "pocketknife", but the latter tends to refer to larger and more robust versions, sometimes with more attached tools, suited to heavier duty for casual or ad hoc applications outdoors or in workshops.
A hysterical person.
A musical instrument of the brass family, generally tuned to the key of B-flat; by extension, any type of lip-vibrated aerophone, most often valveless and not chromatic.
definitions.example: The royal herald sounded a trumpet to announce their arrival.

definitions.definition: Someone who plays the trumpet; a trumpeter.
definitions.example: The trumpets were assigned to stand at the rear of the orchestra pit.

definitions.definition: The cry of an elephant, or any similar loud cry.
definitions.example: The large bull gave a basso trumpet as he charged the hunters.

definitions.definition: One who praises, or propagates praise, or is the instrument of propagating it.
A funnel, or short flaring pipe, used as a guide or conductor, as for yarn in a knitting machine.
A kind of traffic interchange involving at least one loop ramp connecting traffic either entering or leaving the terminating expressway with the far lanes of the continuous highway.
A powerful reed stop in organs, having a trumpet-like sound.
To sound loudly, be amplified
definitions.example: The music trumpeted from the speakers, hurting my ears.

definitions.definition: To play the trumpet.
definitions.example: Cedric made a living trumpeting for the change of passersby in the subway.

definitions.definition: Of an elephant, to make its cry.
definitions.example: The circus trainer cracked the whip, signaling the elephant to trumpet.

definitions.definition: To give a loud cry like that of an elephant.
To proclaim loudly; to promote enthusiastically
definitions.example: Andy trumpeted Jane's secret across the school, much to her embarrassment.

definitions.definition: Voracious; avaricious.
Given to taking by force or plundering; aggressively greedy.
(of an animal, usually a bird) Subsisting off live prey.
A current (constantly changing) trend, favored for frivolous rather than practical, logical, or intellectual reasons.
Popular trends.
definitions.example: Check out the latest in fashion.

definitions.definition: A style or manner in which something is done.
The make or form of anything; the style, shape, appearance, or mode of structure; pattern, model; workmanship; execution.
definitions.example: the fashion of the ark, of a coat, of a house, of an altar, etc.

definitions.definition: Polite, fashionable, or genteel life; social position; good breeding.
definitions.example: men of fashion

definitions.definition: To make, build or construct, especially in a crude or improvised way.
To make in a standard manner; to work.
To fit, adapt, or accommodate to.
To forge or counterfeit.
Resembling a farce; ludicrous; absurd.
Any period of seven consecutive days.
A period of seven days beginning with Sunday or Monday.
A period of five days beginning with Monday.
A subdivision of the month into longer periods of work days punctuated by shorter weekend periods of days for markets, rest, or religious observation such as a sabbath.
definitions.example: A 4-day week consists of Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday.

definitions.definition: Seven days after (sometimes before) a specified date.
definitions.example: I'll see you Thursday week.

definitions.definition: To keep down by unjust force.
definitions.example: The rural poor were oppressed by the land-owners.

definitions.definition: To make sad or gloomy.
definitions.example: We were oppressed by the constant grey skies.

definitions.definition: Physically to press down on (someone) with harmful effects; to smother, crush.
The act of illustrating; the act of making clear and distinct; education; also, the state of being illustrated, or of being made clear and distinct.
That which illustrates; a comparison or example intended to make clear or apprehensible, or to remove obscurity.
A picture designed to decorate a volume or elucidate a literary work.
A calculated prevision of insurance premiums and returns (life insurance)
A statement of what will happen in the future.
A probability estimation based on statistical methods.
Emerging; just coming into existence.
Describing a quantity of object that is starting to grow from zero or an infinitesimal beginning. Also the creation or identification of an infinitesimal delta.
Describing the state, aspect, or practice of an abstract concept.

Of the state of an element at the time it is being generated from some compound or transitioning from one state to another; Newly released from a compound (especially hydrogen and oxygen) by a chemical reaction or electrolysis and possessing heightened reactivity; Newly synthesized (especially protein or RNA) by translation or transcription.
A dessert made by boiling flavoured gelatin in water
Money paid to the government other than for transaction-specific goods and services.
A burdensome demand.
definitions.example: a heavy tax on time or health

definitions.definition: A task exacted from one who is under control; a contribution or service, the rendering of which is imposed upon a subject.
Charge; censure
A lesson to be learned.
Suggestive of sexual impropriety; bordering on the indelicate.
A type of cake whose main flavoring is ginger.
Something ersatz; something showy but insubstantial.
A flamboyant Victorian-era architectural style.
A piece of furniture, usually flat and soft, on which to rest or sleep.
definitions.example:
My cat often sleeps on my bed.
I keep a glass of water next to my bed when I sleep.

definitions.definition: A place, or flat surface or layer, on which something else rests or is laid.
definitions.example: The meats and cheeses lay on a bed of lettuce.

definitions.definition: (heading) A layer or surface.
Senses relating to a bed as a place for resting or sleeping.
Senses relating to a bed as a place or layer on which something else rests or is laid.
(of a person) The quality of speaking or stating the truth; truthfulness.
Something that is true; a truthful statement; a truth.
Agreement with the facts; accordance with the truth; accuracy or precision.
Act of being exact and accurate.
Correctness and carefulness in one's plan of action.
To trick or mislead.
Usually preceded by the: collectively, all of the web pages on the Internet stored in different computers around the world that hyperlink to each other and to other kinds of documents and media.
Internet resources that are retrieved by Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP).
